---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new script, use case, or documentation improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature or addition you want to see.

## Problem It Solves

Explain the operational pain point or workflow gap.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the script, folder, or documentation change you have in mind.

## Example Use Case

Show how an engineer, SRE, or platform team would use it.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives or related tools you considered.

## Additional Context

Add links, references, or examples if they help.
